top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Africa CDC Calls for More Ebola Funding
top_signals.summary: As Ebola cases rise in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, Africa CDC's Director General Jean Kaseya says more funding from Western governments is needed to contain the outbreak. Kaseya warns that closing borders won't stop the virus from spreading. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: i-80 Gold terminates Vox Royalty offtake with $4.8M payment
top_signals.summary: i-80 said it is expected to realize cash flow savings through 2028.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump administration issues emergency order to keep Colorado coal plant operating
top_signals.summary: Plant was originally scheduled to shut down at the end of 2025, but in December and again in March, Secretary Wright issued emergency orders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: S&P 500 notches longest losing streak in 10 months as chipmakers slide - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 notches longest losing streak in 10 months as chipmakers slide  Financial Times
